products.name: Shine Boost Hair Gloss Serum
products.description: A finishing serum that adds instant gloss and smoothness to dull hair. Helps tame flyaways without greasiness.
products.how_to_use: Apply 1–2 pumps on dry or damp hair, concentrating on lengths and ends, avoid roots.
